mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO order_item ( order_id, dish_id, dish_name, dish_image_url, dish_price, quantity, amount ) VALUES
( #{item.orderId}, #{item.dishId}, #{item.dishName}, #{item.dishImageUrl}, #{item.dishPrice}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.amount} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id, dish_id, dish_name, dish_image_url, dish_price, quantity, amount FROM order_item WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY id ASC
